chats.askAnything: Ask me anything about your business and I'll help you out.
chats.generalDescription: Start a conversation with your AI assistant about general topics related to your business.
chats.marketingDescription: Get help with marketing strategies, campaigns, and promotional content for your business.
chats.financeDescription: Discuss financial planning, budgeting, and money management for your business.
chats.salesDescription: Get assistance with sales strategies, customer acquisition, and revenue growth.
chats.customerServiceDescription: Improve your customer service approach and handle customer inquiries effectively.
chats.customerDescription: Improve your customer service approach and handle customer inquiries effectively.
chats.researchDescription: Conduct research, analyze market trends, and gather insights for your business decisions.
chats.globalDescription: Start a conversation with your AI assistant about general topics related to your business.

overview.emptyDescription: Sessions, emails, notes, and generated reports will appear here as you work with this patient.
overview.patientSummaryDescription: This overview refreshes after completed sessions and blends chart details with recent activity.
overview.patientSummaryPlaceholder: No patient summary yet. Complete a session to generate one.
overview.detailsEmpty: No additional patient context has been added yet.
overview.medicalProfileEmpty: No allergies, medications, or medical history added yet.
overview.diagnosisEmpty: No carry-forward diagnosis has been added yet.
overview.diagnosisReasoningPlaceholder: Why this remains on the list
overview.diagnosisSectionEmpty: No entries yet. Add the diagnoses you want to carry into the next session.
overview.clinicalStateUpdateError: Couldn't update patient diagnosis and todos.

labs.emptyDescription: Lab results will appear here after analyzing patient data in a session or adding a lab note.
labs.addLabNoteDescription: Enter lab results text and AI will analyze them to extract structured data.
labs.addLabNotePlaceholder: Paste or type lab results here...
labs.customRangesDescription: Set patient-specific reference ranges for lab tests. These will override the default ranges when evaluating this patient's results.

messages.connectionExpired: Your Gmail connection has expired. Please reconnect to view messages.

emptyState.title: No messages yet
emptyState.description: There are no email conversations with this patient. Messages will appear here once you start exchanging emails.

workout.generatePlanDescription: Describe any specific goals, limitations, or context for this patient. The AI will also reference their personal details and past sessions.
workout.generatePlanPlaceholder: e.g. Focus on shoulder rehab, avoid high-impact exercises, patient runs twice a week...
workout.editPlanDescription: Describe how you want to change this plan. AI will revise the full plan using your instructions, patient context, past sessions, and the exercise catalog. The same plan is updated in place.
workout.editPlanPlaceholder: e.g. Add a fourth day focused on core, lower volume on shoulders, swap high-impact moves for low-impact options…
workout.summaryPlaceholder: No overview yet. Click to add one.
workout.removeExerciseConfirm: Remove this exercise from the plan?
workout.noExercisesInDay: No exercises in this day yet.

actions.activeSessionDescription: Another session is already in progress. Open it to continue there, or end it before starting a different one.

legal.prefix: By signing in you agree to our
legal.acknowledge: By continuing, you acknowledge that you understand and agree to the

slide0.lead: We finally have one place for clinical notes, billing, and follow-ups,
slide0.highlight: and the team onboards new staff in a day instead of a week"
slide0.name: Jordan Lee

slide1.lead: The biggest win is knowing nothing slips through the cracks
slide1.highlight: from intake to the next visit."
slide1.name: Samira Khan

slide2.lead: We replaced three tools with a single workflow
slide2.highlight: and patients get clearer, faster answers."
slide2.name: Elena Rossi

slide3.lead: I needed software that my whole team would actually use
slide3.highlight: not another clunky back office app."
slide3.name: Alex Nguyen

mfa.title: Multi-factor authentication
mfa.description: Add an additional layer of security to your account by requiring more than just a password to sign in.
mfa.socialAccountNotice: Two-factor authentication is not available for social login accounts.

errors.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

setup.passwordDescription: Enter your password to enable two-factor authentication.
setup.scanDescription: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
setup.backupCodesDescription: Save these backup codes in a secure place. You can use them to access your account if you lose your device.
setup.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to complete setup.

disable.title: Remove two-factor authentication
disable.description: Enter your password to remove two-factor authentication from your account.
